nasb.text: and from the tribe of Gad: Ramoth in Gilead with its pasture lands, Mahanaim with its pasture lands,

esv.text: and out of the tribe of Gad: Ramoth in Gilead with its pasturelands, Mahanaim with its pasturelands,

cnv.text: 又從迦得支派中，給了他們基列的拉末和屬於拉末的草場，瑪哈念和屬於瑪哈念的草場，

ccb.text: 从迦得支派得到了基列的拉末及其周围的草场、玛哈念、
